label: Lab_1_Trivial_F1DEAD (port 1892)
info:
Phase 1, Lab 1 (Trivial) â€” single zone, single TaskLight, single sensor.

Physics (deterministic, pure function of flow state):
  Z1Level = 25 (ambient)
         + 0.10 * Sunshine                  (weak uncontrolled IV)
         + (Z1Light ? 400 : 0)               (lamp Causes)
No blinds, no spotlight, no cross-zone bleed.

Reproducibility:
  - update_env contains NO Math.random() â€” physics is a pure function of
    (Z1Light, Sunshine).
  - Stochasticity is confined to /was/rl/reset (episode init) and pinned by
    SunshinePinned for the duration of the episode.
  - /was/rl/setState pins exact values for benchmark scenarios.

Energy (per-tick, single source of truth):
  TotalEnergyCost += (Z1Light ? 1 : 0) every tick.

State vector consumed by QLearner: [Z1Level (0-3), Z1Light (0/1)] = 8 states.
WoT TD: src/resources/interactions-lab1.ttl (port 1892).

Start with: node-red --port 1892 --userDir .node-red-lab1
